repository_ssim: St. Catherine's Monastery of the Sinai
full_text_tesim: Front and back cover missing, spine separate
Originally belonged to the same manuscript as Arabic NF M 27 and Arabic NF M 28
Quires 1-8 unsewn, quires 9-15 sewn; individual folios of various size | Some folios stitched together of different pieces
Some decorative lines in black and red ink
Text continues in Arabic NF M 28, with consecutive pencil foliation
